title: Ma and Pa Kettle at the Fair
writer: Martin Ragaway, Leonard Stern, Jack Henley
actors: Marjorie Main, Percy Kilbride, James Best
plot: Ma and Pa are trying to raise enough money at the county fair to send their daughter Rosie to college. Ma competes in baking and Pa enters a trotter in a horse race, while Rosie takes up with handsome young Marvin Johnson.
